description: VERIFIED LIVE: Apple Music via content-script DOM extraction (Apple's MusicKit API needs a developer token). The Apple Music web player renders album and playlist tracklists in stable songs-list-row markup — public album/playlist pages need no login — so this tool reads the tracklist straight from the DOM of your open Apple Music tab. Navigate the tab to an album or playlist (music.apple.com/…/album/… or /playlist/…) and let it load, then call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on a public album: tracks with title and duration extracted correctly.

tools.name: apple_music_tracklist
tools.description: Tracks on the current Apple Music ALBUM or PLAYLIST page (navigate the tab to music.apple.com/<region>/album/… or /playlist/… first; scroll to load more). Returns each track's title, duration and (when shown per-row) artist. VERIFIED.
